subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy call hath reached the sacred threshold of the divine Oneness, and thy sighs and lamentations from separation and deprivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی ندایت باستان مقدس حضرت احدیت واصل و آه و فغان از هجران و حرمانت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
